product: Email notifications for expiring service principal tokens (Beta)
tagline: Databricks now automatically sends email notifications to workspace admins when a service principal token is within seven days of expiring.
what_it_does: Databricks now automatically sends email notifications to workspace admins when a service principal token is within seven days of expiring. This feature is in Beta. Notifications are sent for tokens with a lifetime greater than seven days that have been used at least once.
why_it_matters: Databricks recommends you minimize your personal access token exposure with the following steps: 1.
key_takeaway: Databricks now automatically sends email notifications to workspace admins when a service principal token is within seven days of expiring.
